## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Hypermode's content strategy challenges and plan next steps for retention.](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hypermode (formerly D graph) is experiencing an identity crisis, frequently changing content focus (thought leadership → developer focus → uncertain)](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Client's CMO (Jessica) is struggling with product positioning and terminology, impacting content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [GrowthX team to propose new ways to leverage existing resources and align with Hypermode's evolving needs](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Continuous communication and education are crucial for managing client expectations and demonstrating value](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

## Topics

### Hypermode's Content Strategy Challenges

  - [Frequent pivots in content focus (thought leadership, developer focus, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [CMO unsure about product positioning and terminology](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Difficulty finding relevant keywords with search volume](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Approved topics and content clusters exist, but strategy keeps shifting](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Current priority: Knowledge Graph Foundation content (3 specific topics)](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Next Steps

  - [Review existing resources: user feedback, testimonials, approved Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Analyze Jessica's comments and preferences in document version histories](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Collaborate with Celia (account manager) to understand workflow adaptations](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Develop suggestions for leveraging existing materials in new ways](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Maintain frequent communication with Jessica, sharing ideas even if not fully formed](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

### Client Education and Expectation Management

  - [Ongoing challenge: educating clients on SEO concepts and content performance](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [No standardized educational resources for onboarding (potential area for improvement)](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Importance of balancing technical content with more accessible formats (e.g., case studies)](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Need for consistent performance reporting to demonstrate content value](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

### Team Dynamics and Communication

  - [Importance of accurately relaying client feedback within the team](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Distinguishing between actual issues and misunderstandings (e.g., outbound vs. inbound focus)](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Adapting to clients' varying levels of SEO knowledge and involvement](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review all available Hypermode documentation and resources](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Consult with Celia to understand current content strategy and workflow](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Develop suggestions for leveraging existing materials in new ways](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Begin sharing ideas and updates with Jessica to maintain communication flow](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Prepare for ongoing client education on SEO concepts and content performance](https://fathom.video/share/H1BewX7RWAbszRQSaw1bcHoJGjujbfcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
